name: Hargreave Hale AIM VCT plc
summary: Hargreave Hale AIM VCT plc is a venture capital trust (VCT) that invests in early-stage and growing companies listed on the AIM market of the London Stock Exchange. The company aims to provide investors with tax-free dividends and capital growth by investing in a diversified portfolio of qualifying AIM companies. Its investment manager is Gresham House Asset Management.
